message:
test(core): spawn_bounded peak concurrency cap and budget exhaustion tests

New record_peak() helper for atomic CAS-based high-water-mark tracking.

spawn_bounded_respects_peak_concurrency_cap: spawns 6 tasks with
concurrency limit 2, each recording active count.  Verifies peak
active never exceeds 2 and all 6 results returned in order.

spawn_bounded_with_exhausted_budget_completes_already_spawned: verifies
that tasks already in-flight complete even after the Cx budget is
exhausted, while tasks not yet spawned are skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
